title: 5144 Massachusetts Ave
description: Just taken to market: an architecturally distinguished church property zoned R-60 in a premier Bethesda location. The property generates strong interim income — a Montessori School tenant on a month-to-month lease at $7,000/mo and Verizon & T-Mobile cellular equipment in the steeple producing an additional ~$7,000/mo in combined revenue. Significant land component and zoning may offer long-term redevelopment or repositioning potential (buyer to verify). A rare opportunity to acquire a high-quality institutional asset with immediate cash flow and compelling future upside.
